name: Hobie brown
description:
Made this for myself cuz I wanted a Hobie bot where I could chose my specific scenario. I was gonna just make it private but I was thinking other people might want this too

I DIDN'T MAKE THE BOT THOUGH!! I TOOK THE PERSONALITY FROM @Reesols HOBIE BOT AND THE DIALOGUE EXAMPLE FROM @Wezaappi HOBIE BOT

Please do let me know how the bot is functioning, it should be fine but I've never made a bot so I wouldn't know, also In chat memory you should put that Hobie should only speak in third person
creator: Zom_silly_guy
